Guide for students

What is Transnational Education?

TNE , Transnational Education , means studying for a degree from a university in a different country to the one awarding it. Earn a UK, Australian, Canadian or US degree without leaving your home region. For a comprehensive independent guide to TNE quality and standards, visit tneinstitute.com →

Why does TNE matter?

Instead of spending £20,000+ per year studying in the UK, you might study the same degree at an overseas campus for significantly less, with lower living costs, no UK visa complexity, and a much shorter flight from home. The degree awarded is identical. Employers recognise the awarding institution , not where you physically studied.

Important: Always verify that the TNE campus is accredited by the national body in the delivery country and that the degree is formally awarded by the home university. TNE Institute only lists programmes where both conditions are confirmed. For detailed guidance on TNE quality frameworks, visit tneinstitute.com.
The four main TNE delivery models
🏛
Branch Campus
A university opens a full physical campus in another country under its own brand. The parent university controls curriculum and awards the degree.
e.g. University of Birmingham Dubai, CMU Africa (Kigali)
🤝
Franchise Programme
A local institution delivers a programme designed by an overseas university, which awards the degree and maintains quality control.
e.g. A local college delivering a University of Hertfordshire programme
🔗
Joint / Dual Degree
Two universities collaborate on delivery. Students may receive degrees from one or both institutions on completion.
e.g. Joint MSc awarded by a UK and East African university
💻
Online / Distance
Full programme delivered online. Study from anywhere. The degree carries the same weight as an on-campus award.
e.g. University of London Worldwide BSc
How is quality assured?
🏆
Same Degree Award
The certificate is issued by the home university. Non-negotiable for reputable TNE.
📋
Curriculum Control
The home university controls curriculum, assessments and marking throughout.
🔍
External Review
UK programmes reviewed by the QAA. Australian by TEQSA. Regular mandatory inspections.
🌍
British Council Register
Public register of UK TNE activity , a primary verification source used by TNE Institute.
📊
Employer Recognition
Major employers evaluate the awarding institution, not delivery location. A Birmingham degree is a Birmingham degree.
⚠️
What to Watch For
Avoid programmes where the awarding institution is unclear or where the local partner issues the degree.
Contact us: mark@tneinstitute.org  ·  LinkedIn: TNE Institute
Transparency & accuracy

Our Data

TNE Institute aggregates data from multiple public and licensed sources. This page explains where each data type comes from, how current it is, and what you must independently verify.

Understanding the search filters
Quick guide: QS World Rank reflects global standing. Fees shown are total annual cost estimate. Entry requirements show A-Level grades or IB points. Show full guide ▾
>
Data sources
📋 Entry Requirements
● Manual
From university prospectuses. Eligibility indicator is a guide only , universities make final decisions.
⚠️ Legal Disclaimer

TNE Institute is an independent information service. We are not an educational institution, recruitment agent, or admissions service. All data is provided for general informational purposes only.

We make reasonable efforts to ensure accuracy but cannot guarantee that information is current, complete, or error-free. Fees, entry requirements, programme availability and campus locations are subject to change without notice. Users must verify all information directly with the relevant university before making any application or financial commitment.

TNE Institute accepts no liability for decisions made based on information on this platform. This does not constitute educational, financial, immigration, or legal advice. Flight route information is indicative only. Safety scores represent general country/city-level data and do not reflect specific campus environments.
Contact us: mark@tneinstitute.org  ·  LinkedIn: TNE Institute
Who we are

Powered by TNE Institute

Something fundamental has shifted in global higher education. Students are no longer passive recipients of what universities choose to offer them. They are informed consumers , and the smartest ones are finding that the rules have completely changed.

⚡ The Amazon Moment for Education
Amazon didn't just make shopping cheaper. It fundamentally transferred power from retailers to consumers , giving people access to more choice, more information, and more value than ever before, without leaving home.

The same shift is happening in higher education right now. A student in Lagos, Nairobi, Accra or Port Louis can today access a University of Birmingham degree in Dubai, a Carnegie Mellon degree in Kigali, or a London School of Economics degree online without the extortionate UK living costs, the visa lottery, or the 12-hour flight. The degree on their CV is identical. The cost is dramatically lower.

Most students don't know this yet. TNE Institute exists to change that.
Students are now in charge

For decades, the international higher education market worked on one model: students paid whatever universities asked, moved wherever universities were located, and navigated opaque information systems designed to serve institutions, not learners.

That model is breaking down. Students now have the voice, the choice, and , critically , they hold the financial power. Universities that want to grow internationally must come to students, not the other way around. The explosion of overseas campuses, online degrees, and transnational partnerships is direct evidence of this shift.

TNE Institute is built on a simple conviction: every student deserves to make their biggest investment decision with complete, accurate, unbiased information. Not brochure copy. Not a recruitment agent's pitch. Real data on real costs, real rankings, and real pathways.

$40k+
Typical UK annual cost vs $10k alternatives
90+
Overseas branch campuses now operating
500+
Programmes compared on TNE Institute
0
Commission earned from universities. Ever.
Our principles
🎯
Evidence over opinion
Every data point is sourced, dated, and explained. Rankings, verified costs, accreditation records. Not marketing copy, not commission-driven advice.
🌍
Students first, always
TNE Institute is free for students. Always. Revenue comes from ethical advertising , never from steering students toward any particular institution.
💡
Radical transparency
We tell you exactly where our data comes from and what you must verify yourself. The Data page is not a footnote , it is a core part of the product.
🏗️
Africa-first, globally minded
We start in Africa because that is where the information gap is greatest and the opportunity is largest. Our ambition is global. Our focus is deliberate.
Contact us: mark@tneinstitute.org  ·  LinkedIn: TNE Institute
Expert Guidance Service

Navigate Your Options
With an Expert

Choosing the right degree, university, and study location is one of the most important financial decisions you will ever make. Get it right with personalised, independent guidance from our founding team.

Dr Mark Edwards
Co-Founder · Director of Partnerships · TNE Expert
PhD · Durham MA · Durham MSc · Loughborough BA First · Liverpool Durham Doctoral Fellow BC Agent Qualified

Mark has spent over 15 years in UK higher education working on international strategy, overseas campuses, and TNE development at Bristol and Glasgow. He transitioned into consultancy in 2023 and now works across the UK, Africa and Asia, with over 20 peer-reviewed publications.

mark@tneinstitute.org
Dr Cheryl Yu
Co-Founder · Director of Programmes · International Education Researcher
17+ Years International HE UK & China Published Author ABCP TNE Committee BC Agent Qualified

With over 17 years of experience in international education across the UK and China, Cheryl combines practitioner and researcher perspectives to promote equitable global partnerships. She has published widely on international HE, including a co-edited book on Internationalisation in the Global South. She serves on the ABCP Speciality Committee on TNE and as Secretary of SACU, founded by Joseph Needham in 1965.

cheryl@tneinstitute.org
What we can help you with
🌍
TNE & Branch Campus Navigation
Understanding which overseas campuses offer genuine quality. Drawing on Mark's hands-on TNE consultancy across UK, Asia and Africa, and Cheryl's published research on international HE partnerships, we give you an insider view no agency can match.
💰
Best Value Degree Strategy
Finding the highest-quality degree at the lowest sustainable cost, factoring in tuition, living, flights, visa, and long-term career return. With over 30 combined years in UK higher education, we know exactly where the value lies.
🎓
Course & University Selection
Cutting through rankings and marketing to identify which institution genuinely fits your background and ambitions. Cheryl's expertise in global HE partnerships and Mark's operational knowledge give you a 360-degree view.
🌏
China, UK & Global Pathways
Specialist guidance on UK-China partnerships and EU-China HE developments, drawing on Cheryl's published research and her roles on the ABCP TNE Committee and SACU. Particularly valuable for students considering multi-country programmes.
📋
Applications & Entry Requirements
Understanding what universities are really looking for and how to position your application. We have reviewed hundreds of applications and know how admissions decisions are made inside Russell Group and global universities.
🏫
Schools & Counsellor Support
Bespoke guidance programmes for schools across Africa and the Indian Ocean region. We work with counsellors to build knowledge of TNE options and articulation pathways that most school-based advisers have never encountered.
Session options
Most popular
30-Minute Introduction
£50

A focused session with one of our experts. Bring your questions on any TNE programme, university choice, cost comparison, or entry requirements. You leave with clarity and a concrete next step.

For complex situations
Bespoke Support Package
POA

Sustained guidance through the full process, from shortlisting through to application, offer management, and pre-departure planning. Priced on a case-by-case basis.

Our advisors take no commission from any university. Guidance is shaped entirely by what is right for the student.

Featured Institutions

University Spotlights

In-depth features on universities and programmes that offer exceptional value and quality for international students. Spotlights are paid placements , always clearly labelled , selected only for institutions TNE Institute would genuinely recommend.

Editorial standard: TNE Institute only accepts spotlight placements from institutions we consider genuinely strong options for our audience. A sponsored label does not mean uncritical promotion , all facts are independently verified. Interested in a spotlight? →
B
University of Birmingham Dubai
Spotlight
Branch Campus · Dubai International Academic City · Est. 2008
🇦🇪 Dubai, UAE QS #101 World Russell Group Quality

The University of Birmingham's Dubai campus has been operating since 2008 and awards degrees that are legally and academically identical to those awarded at the Birmingham UK home campus. It operates under the same academic regulations, uses the same curricula and assessment frameworks, and is staffed by Birmingham-appointed faculty. For students from Mauritius, Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya and across Africa, it represents one of the most compelling propositions in global higher education: a genuine Russell Group degree, delivered in a world-class city, with direct flight connections from across the continent, at significantly lower cost than studying in the UK.

$19,500
PGT tuition/yr
#101
QS World Rank
~$12k
Saving vs UK/yr
Direct
Flights from MRU/LOS
Available programmes
MBA MSc Management MSc Finance BEng Engineering BSc Computer Science
🏛
Your institution here
TNE Institute reaches thousands of qualified international students actively researching their next degree. A spotlight gives your institution a detailed, credible, editorially-presented feature to the most engaged audience in international HE search.
Contact us: mark@tneinstitute.org  ·  LinkedIn: TNE Institute
Work with TNE Institute

Services & Partnerships

TNE Institute is always free for students. TNE Institute generates revenue through ethical commercial relationships with institutions, schools, and partners who want to reach the most engaged international student audience in the market. All commercial relationships are clearly labelled and never influence our independent guidance or search results.

50+
Years combined HE practice
Global
Network across 4 continents
100%
Founders hold UK university doctorates
BC
All British Council qualified
For students & families
Always free to search
🎓
Expert Guidance Sessions
One-to-one guidance from TNE Institute experts. 30-minute introductory sessions from £50. Bespoke longer-term packages available. All advisors are BC qualified with doctoral-level HE expertise and deep TNE specialism.
For universities & TNE providers
✨
University Spotlight
A full editorial feature on the Spotlights page. In-depth, independently verified coverage of your campus, programmes, and value proposition. Clearly labelled as a paid placement. Seen by thousands of active searchers.
📌
Featured Course Listing
A prominent sponsored card on the search homepage seen by every visitor. Clearly labelled. Direct link to your application or information page. Promotes specific programmes to an active, high-intent audience.
🤝
Data Partnership
Ensure your programme data is current, accurate, and prominently represented across the platform. Includes verified listing, regular updates, and priority placement in relevant results.
TNE consultancy for institutions

TNE Institute's global expert network has over 100 years of combined practice across UK and international higher education. Our consultants have held senior roles at Russell Group institutions, advised on franchise and branch campus operations across Africa, the Middle East, and Asia-Pacific, and have deep familiarity with QAA, TEQSA, and British Council frameworks. We work with universities, governments, and education bodies on TNE strategy, quality assurance, partnership development, and market entry.

🏛
TNE Strategy & Market Entry
Advising universities on entering new markets through branch campuses, franchise agreements, or online delivery. Market analysis, regulatory navigation, partnership identification, and feasibility assessment for African and Indian Ocean markets.
📋
Quality Assurance & Compliance
Supporting institutions through QAA, TEQSA, and British Council quality review processes for TNE provision. Audit preparation, documentation, staff training, and ongoing compliance monitoring.
📬
Newsletter & Content Partnership
Featured placement in the TNE Institute Weekly newsletter reaching thousands of opted-in subscribers actively researching global HE. Highly targeted, high-intent audience across Africa and the Indian Ocean region.
🌍
Student Recruitment Support
Supporting universities with ethical, BC-compliant student recruitment across African markets. Agent training, counsellor engagement, school partnership programmes, and market intelligence for Mauritius, Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, and South Africa.
For schools & counsellors
🏫
Student Outreach Sessions
In-person or remote sessions for students and staff on how to access TNE opportunities most students never find. We show students how to identify the best-value, highest-quality degrees closest to home, and how to capitalise on pathways that traditional guidance misses entirely. Designed to maximise the value of every student's higher education decision.
📚
Counsellor Training & CPD
CPD workshops for school counsellors on navigating global HE, TNE, articulation pathways, and cost-effective study options. Delivered by BC qualified TNE Institute experts. Available online and in-person across Africa and the Indian Ocean.
A note on our scope: TNE Institute is updated regularly as we add new universities, campuses and programmes. We plan to expand the platform over time to include articulation agreements: pathways that allow students to begin a degree locally and transfer to a top global institution to complete it. If your institution is not yet listed or you would like to get in touch, we welcome your contact.
Get in touch
Commercial & Partnership Enquiry
All enquiries reviewed by Dr Mark Edwards or Dr Cheryl Yu. We respond within 2 working days.
Email: [email protected]  ·  Website: tneinstitute.com  ·  Response time: Within 2 working days
Campus Spotlights · India

Branch Campuses
in India

India has become one of the world's most active host countries for international branch campuses, accelerated by the National Education Policy 2020 and new UGC regulations in 2023. Universities from the UK, Australia, Italy and beyond are establishing or planning campuses across Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai and GIFT City.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

Campus Spotlights · Singapore

Branch Campuses
in Singapore

Singapore is one of the most established global education hubs, with over a dozen international branch campuses from France, Germany, Australia, India, China and the UK. The island's world-class infrastructure, business environment, and gateway position to Southeast Asia make it a top destination for internationally mobile students.

Campus Spotlights · Malaysia

Branch Campuses
in Malaysia

Malaysia has one of the most developed international branch campus ecosystems in the world. UK and Australian universities have been present for over two decades, offering full degrees at significantly lower cost than studying in the UK or Australia. The Malaysia Qualification Agency ensures consistent quality standards.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

Campus Spotlights · Egypt

Branch Campuses
in Egypt

Egypt has emerged as a significant destination for international branch campuses, particularly in its new cities. The New Administrative Capital near Cairo hosts several UK and European campuses. Egypt's large graduate population and government investment in higher education make it a growing market.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

Campus Spotlights · GCC (Gulf)

Branch Campuses
in GCC (Gulf)

The Gulf Cooperation Council states, UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Kuwait and Oman, host the highest concentration of international branch campuses in the Middle East. Dubai's Knowledge Park and Abu Dhabi's zones have established the region as a global higher education crossroads, drawing institutions from the UK, Australia, France, USA and India.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

Campus Spotlights · Vietnam

Branch Campuses
in Vietnam

Vietnam has a rapidly growing higher education sector and is an increasingly attractive destination for international branch campuses. RMIT University has established the most prominent presence, with two fully operational campuses. The country's young demographics and expanding middle class make it a significant emerging market.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

Campus Spotlights · Indonesia

Branch Campuses
in Indonesia

Indonesia is the world's fourth most populous country and has a rapidly growing higher education sector. International campuses are still relatively few but growing, with Monash University's purpose-built BSD City campus representing the most significant presence. Government policy increasingly favours international partnerships.

📌 Data source: Campus data from C-BERT International Campus Database and official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly with institutions before applying. ⭐ = QS Top 100 globally.

🇰🇿 Country Spotlight

Kazakhstan
Branch Campuses

Kazakhstan is rapidly becoming Central Asia's leading academic hub. 23 branch campuses now operate nationally, with more opening in 2025-26. Cardiff University became the first Russell Group university here in September 2025. The government offers financial incentives including rent-free land to attract global universities.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

🇬🇷 Country Spotlight

Greece
Branch Campuses

Greece opened its higher education system to foreign branches for the first time in 2025 under Law 5094/2024. Four campuses are licensed for 2025-26. EU residency rights and European job market access after graduation.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

🇫🇷 Country Spotlight

France
Branch Campuses

France hosts international campuses particularly in Paris, offering English-taught degrees from US and UK institutions. QS ranks Paris 7th globally as a student city. EU location with world-class cultural and professional opportunities.

🇲🇹 Country Spotlight

Malta
Branch Campuses

Malta offers EU residency and English-medium education in a Mediterranean setting. Low cost of living relative to Western Europe, small class sizes, and direct EU employment access. Queen Mary's MBBS is GMC-recognised with a 100% pass rate.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

🇵🇱 Country Spotlight

Poland
Branch Campuses

Poland offers UK-validated degrees at significantly lower cost than the UK. Post-Brexit, a UK-validated campus in Poland provides both a UK degree and EU residency rights, making it a rare and valuable combination for students wanting both.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

🇦🇺 Country Spotlight

Australian Universities
Global Branch Campuses

Australia's universities are among the world's most internationally active, operating branch campuses across Asia, the Middle East and Africa. Australian degrees are globally respected, with 9 universities ranked in the QS Top 100. Key feature: Australian campuses typically offer the same degree and entry standards as the home campus, often at a fraction of the cost.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

🇷🇺 Country Spotlight

Russia
Branch Campuses

Lomonosov Moscow State University (QS #105) operates 6 confirmed overseas branch campuses across the former Soviet republics, plus a joint university in China. MSU degrees are recognised globally. Russian government scholarships are available at most campuses. Note: instruction is primarily in Russian; entry requirements differ from Western universities.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

MSU degree. Government-funded scholarships available. Instruction in Russian.

🇨🇳 Country Spotlight

China
Branch Campuses

Chinese universities are beginning to establish overseas campuses, led by Xiamen University in Malaysia (first Chinese overseas campus, est. 2016) and Peking University's HSBC Business School in Oxford (first Chinese campus in the UK). Joint universities with Western partners — such as XJTLU (Liverpool/Xi'an JTU) and UoN Ningbo — are particularly well-established and highly regarded.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

BSc Business~£4500/yr
BSc Economics~£4500/yr
BSc Engineering~£4500/yr
First Chinese university branch campus in Malaysia and overseas. Est. 2016. 6,300+ students from 33 countries. Dual Chinese-Malaysian accreditation.

🇨🇦 Country Spotlight

Canada
Branch Campuses

Canadian universities have historically been reluctant to open overseas branch campuses — the 2025 Policy Options report confirms they are only just beginning to explore this model, driven by the sharp cap on international students in Canada itself. Currently only a handful of partnership-based delivery models exist. For a Canadian degree, most students still need to study in Canada.

📍 Data source: C-BERT + official university websites. Fees are approximate GBP. Always verify directly. ⭐ = QS Top 100.

IELTS6.0
BSc Business Administration~£4500/yr
BSc IT~£4500/yr
BSc Engineering~£4500/yr
UPEI degree delivered via Canadian International College (CIC) Cairo. One of the few Canadian overseas degree partnerships.
